message:
🧹 Replace remaining raw time expressions and remove trivial aliases (#10241)

Replace ~40 raw time expressions (60 * 60 * 1000, 60_000, 3_600_000, etc.)
with shared constants from lib/constants/time.ts. Remove trivial 1:1 aliases
(ONE_HOUR_MS = MS_PER_HOUR) in favor of using the canonical names directly.

Fixes #10232, Fixes #10234

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
